deep_dive.title: IRumAI: Reinforcement Learning for Indian Rummy
deep_dive.abstract: Despite its massive player base and complex hidden-information dynamics, Indian Rummy has received no reinforcement learning attention. Existing agents rely on combinatorial search, which is tactically strong but slow at inference. We present IRumAI, the first RL agent for the domain. IRumAI integrates Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), meld-aware observation encoding, deadwood-driven reward shaping, and a dual-branch convolutional architecture. IRumAI is RL-trained solely against weak heuristics, after a one-time behaviour-cloning warm-start on stronger demonstration data. It generalises to defeat the entire baseline hierarchy, including a 53.9% win rate against the strongest search-based opponent unseen during RL training. Bypassing explicit search, IRumAI requires just 0.33 ms per action, which is over 7,000x faster than the state-of-the-art heuristic. Ablations validate our architectural choices, and linear probing reveals that the network implicitly models the opponent's hidden hand from public interactions.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: RL agent for Indian Rummy using PPO and reward shaping
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用PPO和奖励塑形训练印度拉米纸牌RL代理
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用PPO和奖励塑形训练印度拉米纸牌RL代理
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用PPO和奖励塑形训练印度拉米纸牌RL代理
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: IRumAI is the first RL agent for Indian Rummy, integrating PPO, meld-aware encoding, deadwood-driven reward shaping, and a dual-branch convolutional network, achieving strong generalization against search-based opponents.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对印度拉米纸牌缺乏强化学习研究的问题，本文提出IRumAI，首个针对该领域的强化学习代理。该方法结合PPO、牌型感知编码、死木奖励塑形和双分支卷积架构，仅通过对弱启发式对手进行自博弈训练，并在强演示数据上行为克隆预热。IRumAI展现出优异的泛化能力，在未见的搜索型对手上取得53.9%的胜率，且推理耗时极短。这项工作证明了强化学习在不完全信息纸牌游戏中的有效性，为游戏AI开发提供了新思路。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对印度拉米纸牌缺乏强化学习研究的问题，本文提出IRumAI，首个针对该领域的强化学习代理。该方法结合PPO、牌型感知编码、死木奖励塑形和双分支卷积架构，仅通过对弱启发式对手进行自博弈训练，并在强演示数据上行为克隆预热。IRumAI展现出优异的泛化能力，在未见的搜索型对手上取得53.9%的胜率，且推理耗时极短。这项工作证明了强化学习在不完全信息纸牌游戏中的有效性，为游戏AI开发提供了新思路。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: reinforcement learning techniques for training game AI

deep_dive.title: Superhuman AI for Generals.io Using Self-Play Reinforcement Learning
deep_dive.abstract: We present a superhuman AI agent for Generals.io, a real-time strategy game that requires both long-horizon planning and short-term tactics under strong imperfect information. Trained for four days on 4x NVIDIA H200 GPUs, our agent reaches #1 on the public 1v1 leaderboard of over 5,000 human players, leading the second-ranked player by the same margin that separates second place from 25th, and beats the two top-ranked humans head-to-head with a combined 199-70 record across 269 ladder matches. A key enabler is a JAX-native simulator that reaches tens of millions of frames per second on a single GPU, roughly a 10,000x speedup over the prior simulator. On top of this, we train a vision transformer policy end-to-end by self-play with a policy-gradient loop and sparse win/loss reward, using top-advantage sample filtering and an exponential moving average of the policy parameters. Taken together, our findings highlight what matters, and what does not, once a fast simulator removes the data bottleneck.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Self-play RL to train superhuman game AI
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 自博弈强化学习训练超人游戏AI
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 自博弈强化学习训练超人游戏AI
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 自博弈强化学习训练超人游戏AI
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Presents a superhuman AI for Generals.io trained via self-play RL with a fast JAX simulator, achieving #1 on the leaderboard and beating top humans.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该研究针对实时战略游戏Generals.io，提出基于自博弈强化学习的AI训练方法。利用JAX原生模拟器实现端到端视觉Transformer策略训练，在1v1天梯赛中击败人类顶尖玩家，达到排行榜第一。方法通过高效模拟加速训练，证明了自博弈RL在复杂游戏中的超人性能。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该研究针对实时战略游戏Generals.io，提出基于自博弈强化学习的AI训练方法。利用JAX原生模拟器实现端到端视觉Transformer策略训练，在1v1天梯赛中击败人类顶尖玩家，达到排行榜第一。方法通过高效模拟加速训练，证明了自博弈RL在复杂游戏中的超人性能。

deep_dive.title: Connect the Dots: Training LLMs for Long-Lifecycle Agents with Cross-Domain Generalization Via Reinforcement Learning
deep_dive.abstract: This work presents a general framework for training large language models (LLMs) to "Connect the Dots" (CoD), a meta-capability required by long-lifecycle agents: as an LLM-based AI agent gets deployed in an environment, it solves a long sequence of tasks while continuously exploring the environment, learning from its own experiences, and iteratively self-updating its context about the environment, thereby achieving progressively better performance on future tasks conditioned on the updated context. Major components of the CoD framework include: (1) algorithm design and infrastructure for end-to-end reinforcement learning (RL) with long rollout sequences interleaving solve-task and update-context episodes; (2) tasks and environments for incentivizing and eliciting the targeted meta-capability in LLMs during training, as well as for faithfully measuring progress during evaluation. We present proof-of-concept implementations of the CoD framework, including a GRPO-style RL algorithm with fine-grained credit assignment, as well as tasks and environments tailored to the targeted meta-capability (rather than domain-specific LLM capabilities or standard task-by-task RL). Empirical results validate the efficacy of end-to-end RL training in the CoD setting, and demonstrate the potential for out-of-distribution generalization -- within the training domains, across different domains, and from CoD to Ralph-loop settings -- of the elicited meta-capability. Our investigation of CoD connects several lines of prior works, and opens up new opportunities for advancing LLMs and AI agents. To facilitate further research and applications, we release our implementations at \url{https://github.com/agentscope-ai/Trinity-RFT/tree/research/cod/examples/research_cod}.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Trains LLM-based agents with end-to-end reinforcement learning over long rollouts, directly applicable to game playing agents.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用端到端强化学习训练LLM代理，通过长序列推演在环境中持续探索和学习，可直接用于游戏玩代理。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用端到端强化学习训练LLM代理，通过长序列推演在环境中持续探索和学习，可直接用于游戏玩代理。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用端到端强化学习训练LLM代理，通过长序列推演在环境中持续探索和学习，可直接用于游戏玩代理。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Connect the Dots framework that trains LLM agents with RL to explore, update context, and improve over long task sequences, enabling game playing agents that learn continuously.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 长生命周期LLM代理需要在部署后持续探索环境并自我更新上下文，但缺乏有效的端到端强化学习框架。本工作提出Connect the Dots框架，通过交错解决任务和更新上下文的长序列强化学习训练LLM，使代理能在探索中迭代改进。该方法赋予代理跨任务和领域泛化的元能力，是训练持续自学习的游戏玩代理的理想路径。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 长生命周期LLM代理需要在部署后持续探索环境并自我更新上下文，但缺乏有效的端到端强化学习框架。本工作提出Connect the Dots框架，通过交错解决任务和更新上下文的长序列强化学习训练LLM，使代理能在探索中迭代改进。该方法赋予代理跨任务和领域泛化的元能力，是训练持续自学习的游戏玩代理的理想路径。

deep_dive.title: A Reward-Petri-Net Interpretation of Temporal Behavior Trees
deep_dive.abstract: This paper introduces an interpretation of Temporal Behavior Trees (TBTs) as Reward-Petri-Nets (RPNs) for reinforcement learning (RL). Designing reward functions for complex, long-horizon robotic tasks is notoriously difficult, especially when tasks have hierarchical structure and temporal constraints. TBTs extend conventional behavior trees (BTs) used in robotic applications by incorporating temporal properties into their leaf nodes. This allows TBTs to represents not only the behavioral task structure defined by BT operators such as Sequence, Fallback, and Parallel, but also the task's temporal constraints. In this work, the constraints are specified in the leaf nodes using Linear Temporal Logic. In order to inform RL rewards using TBTs, we provide a translation from TBT into a Petri Net (PN) and show how rewards can be automatically assigned based on the TBT's structure, resulting in a RPN. In a series of increasingly challenging environments, we demonstrate how TBT-based rewards enable learning where vanilla RL fails, improve sample efficiency, and offer flexible, intuitive control over the learning progress. We showcase the learning impact by using different reward distribution schemes and TBT structures.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Behavior trees and RL combined for task design, applicable to game bot development
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 行为树与强化学习结合，可用于游戏AI bot设计
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 行为树与强化学习结合，可用于游戏AI bot设计
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 行为树与强化学习结合，可用于游戏AI bot设计
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Interprets Temporal Behavior Trees (TBTs) as Reward-Petri-Nets to generate RL rewards, enabling hierarchical task structure and temporal constraints; directly supports game AI bot behavior design.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对复杂长时域机器人任务中奖励函数设计困难的问题，提出将时间行为树（TBT）转换为奖励Petri网（RPN）的方法。TBT在传统行为树基础上引入线性时序逻辑表达的时序约束，通过转换可为强化学习提供符合任务结构与时序要求的奖励信号。该方法可轻松迁移至游戏AI bot的行为设计，实现结构化且有时序约束的智能行为。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对复杂长时域机器人任务中奖励函数设计困难的问题，提出将时间行为树（TBT）转换为奖励Petri网（RPN）的方法。TBT在传统行为树基础上引入线性时序逻辑表达的时序约束，通过转换可为强化学习提供符合任务结构与时序要求的奖励信号。该方法可轻松迁移至游戏AI bot的行为设计，实现结构化且有时序约束的智能行为。
